name: Chicken Apple Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken, skinned, boned and cut into strips
1 Golden Delicious apple, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a non-stick skillet or wok.
2. Saute chicken until no longer pink; remove from pan.
3. Saute green pepper, onion, and celery until tender-crisp.
4. Return chicken to the pan; add apple and cook for 1 minute.
5. Combine remaining ingredients; add to apple mixture and cook until sauce thickens.
4 servings. Fat: 14 grams per serving / Fiber
Source: "Minnesota Heritage Cookbook Volume II"
